data.name: Crazy Puzzle - Cosplay
data.detailed_description:
Slide, swap, and reveal one piece at a time.

In this seductive puzzle game, your mission is simple: bring each steamy 3D scene to life by rearranging the tiles. The more you play, the more you unlock... and the more you’ll want to see.

Take your time, enjoy every curve, and uncover the beauty hiding just beneath the surface.

◆ Features:

◇ 12 Erotic 3D Puzzles featuring sensual girls in teasing poses

◇ 3 Difficulty Levels - Choose from Easy, Normal, or Hard for the ultimate tease and challenge

◇ Unlockable Gallery - View your completed artwork anytime in the in-game gallery

◇ Unlimited Hints - Stuck? Use hints freely to keep the mood flowing

◇ Steam Achievements - Test your skills and earn achievements as you complete puzzles and master the game

Perfect for relaxing, teasing your mind, or indulging in a little naughty escape.

data.short_description: Swap, slide, and reveal sensual 3D girls in this erotic tile puzzle game. With 12 steamy images, 3 difficulty levels, and an unlockable gallery, it’s the perfect way to tease your brain and your senses.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
